# Sujun Zhu

Sujun Zhu is a full-stack engineer turned Development Manager at IXL Learning in San Mateo, California.

## Current Role

- Development Manager at IXL Learning
- Manages two teams across Education.com, Takeoff by IXL, and adjacent product areas
- Focuses on execution, alignment, team structure, product ownership, and engineering team growth

## Background

- 7+ years building and leading at IXL Learning
- Former Engineering Project Lead for Teacher Analytics
- Former Senior Software Engineer and Software Engineer on analytics and product systems
- Built teacher-facing analytics systems and reporting infrastructure for products serving 14M+ subscribers
- Peak direct management scope: 8 direct reports, including an intern
- Conducted 220+ engineering interview rounds

## Search-Relevant Topics

- Engineering Manager
- Development Manager
- Full-stack engineering leader
- Senior software engineer
- Engineering leadership
- Java
- React
- Analytics systems
- Education technology
- Cross-functional product execution
- Mentoring engineers
- Hiring and interviewing
- San Mateo
